creator: jrh29@alumni.cwru.edu
text:
Burning a FreeBSD/ppc (or ppc64) CD, and inserting it into a machine running OS X 10.5 causes OS X to kernel panic with Corrupt Stack.  It will crash again if the CD is left in when OS X is rebooted.  This might be related to the mkisofs problems already documented.

How-To-Repeat: Burn a FreeBSD 9 CD (ppc or ppc64) and insert it into a PowerPC mac running OS X.
